name: Kenyan Maandazi (Fried Bread)
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the dry ingredients in a mixing bowl.
2. Pour the water and oil into the center of the flour mixture.
3. Mix thoroughly until a dough forms.
4. Knead the dough for 15-20 minutes.
5. Divide the dough into 6 large balls.
6. Roll each ball out into circles.
7. Cut each circle into 4 triangles.
8. Deep fry until golden brown.
